[t].[VoidReason], [t].[VoidTime], [t].[OrderItemId], [t].[AttributeItemId], [t].[AttributeName], [t].[Id0]

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryKitchenTypeId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemKitchenTypeId], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[PrintInBackupReceiptFromCategory], [o0].[PrintInBackupReceiptFromItem], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[TotalVoidAmount], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [o0].[VoidBy], [o0].[VoidByName], [o0].[VoidReason], [o0].[VoidTime], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id0]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderDate] IS NOT NULL AND CONVERT(date, [o].[OrderDate]) = @__posDate_Date_0 AND ([o].[OrderState] <> N'Voided' OR [o].[OrderState] IS NULL) AND ([o].[OrderState] <> N'Canceled' OR [o].[OrderState] IS NULL)
ORDER BY [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[OrderItemId]

    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryKitchenTypeId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemKitchenTypeId], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[PrintInBackupReceiptFromCategory], [o0].[PrintInBackupReceiptFromItem], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[TotalVoidAmount], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [o0].[VoidBy], [o0].[VoidByName], [o0].[VoidReason], [o0].[VoidTime], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id0]

[t].[VoidReason], [t].[VoidTime], [t].[OrderItemId], [t].[AttributeItemId], [t].[AttributeName], [t].[Id0]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryKitchenTypeId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemKitchenTypeId], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[PrintInBackupReceiptFromCategory], [o0].[PrintInBackupReceiptFromItem], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[TotalVoidAmount], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [o0].[VoidBy], [o0].[VoidByName], [o0].[VoidReason], [o0].[VoidTime], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id0]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderDate] IS NOT NULL AND CONVERT(date, [o].[OrderDate]) = @__posDate_Date_0 AND ([o].[OrderState] <> N'Voided' OR [o].[OrderState] IS NULL) AND ([o].[OrderState] <> N'Canceled' OR [o].[OrderState] IS NULL)
ORDER BY [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[OrderItemId]

WHERE [o].[OrderDate] IS NOT NULL AND CONVERT(date, [o].[OrderDate]) = @__posDate_Date_0 AND ([o].[OrderState] <> N'Voided' OR [o].[OrderState] IS NULL) AND ([o].[OrderState] <> N'Canceled' OR [o].[OrderState] IS NULL)
ORDER BY [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[OrderItemId]

[t].[TotalAmount], [t].[TotalDiscountAmount], [t].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [t].[TotalDiscountPrice], [t].[TotalVoidAmount], [t].[UnitPrice], [t].[VoidAmount], [t].[VoidBy], [t].[VoidByName], [t].[VoidReason], [t].[VoidTime], [t].[OrderItemId], [t].[AttributeItemId], [t].[AttributeName], [t].[Id0]
FROM [Orders] AS [o]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryKitchenTypeId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemKitchenTypeId], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[PrintInBackupReceiptFromCategory], [o0].[PrintInBackupReceiptFromItem], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[TotalVoidAmount], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [o0].[VoidBy], [o0].[VoidByName], [o0].[VoidReason], [o0].[VoidTime], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id0]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderDate] IS NOT NULL AND CONVERT(date, [o].[OrderDate]) = @__posDate_Date_0 AND ([o].[OrderState] <> N'Voided' OR [o].[OrderState] IS NULL) AND ([o].[OrderState] <> N'Canceled' OR [o].[OrderState] IS NULL)
ORDER BY [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[OrderItemId]

    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CategoryId], [o0].[CategoryKitchenTypeId], [o0].[CategoryName], [o0].[DineInOrderId], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[IsVoided], [o0].[ItemKitchenTypeId], [o0].[ItemName], [o0].[ItemNameAr], [o0].[MenuSalesItemId], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[OrderType], [o0].[PrintInBackupReceiptFromCategory], [o0].[PrintInBackupReceiptFromItem], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[TotalAfterDiscount], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountAmount], [o0].[TotalDiscountPercentage], [o0].[TotalDiscountPrice], [o0].[TotalVoidAmount], [o0].[UnitPrice], [o0].[VoidAmount], [o0].[VoidBy], [o0].[VoidByName], [o0].[VoidReason], [o0].[VoidTime], [o1].[OrderItemId], [o1].[AttributeItemId], [o1].[AttributeName], [o1].[Id] AS [Id0]
    FROM [OrdersDetails] AS [o0]
    LEFT JOIN [OrderItemAttributes] AS [o1] ON [o0].[Id] = [o1].[OrderItemId]
) AS [t] ON [o].[Id] = [t].[OrderId]
WHERE [o].[OrderDate] IS NOT NULL AND CONVERT(date, [o].[OrderDate]) = @__posDate_Date_0 AND ([o].[OrderState] <> N'Voided' OR [o].[OrderState] IS NULL) AND ([o].[OrderState] <> N'Canceled' OR [o].[OrderState] IS NULL)
ORDER BY [o].[Id], [t].[Id], [t].[OrderItemId]
